title: Mushroom Hats
description: Hats of Mushroom and Fungus for Vanilla.
body:
What this TPack does is to make, by having the Red and Brown Mushroom, and also the Crimson and Warped Fungus on the head, mushroom hats.

By entering the following command /item replace entity <target> armor.head with <mushroom like red_mushroom or warped_fungus>, the selected mushroom to the entity will be given a mushroom hat.
Aesthetic, but nice.
